name: credentials-isolation
description: Verify credential vault scoping (domain, mode, field type).

steps.expect: async (response, ctx) => { const v = ctx.agent.credentials; v.save('naver.com', 'user1', 'pass1'); v.save('google.com', 'user2', 'pass2'); const list = v.list(); return [ {ok: list.length === 2, message: 'expected 2 saved credentials'}, {ok: list.every(c => !('password' in c)), message: 'list() must NEVER expose passwords'}, {ok: v.get('naver.com')?.username === 'user1', message: 'naver credential should be retrievable'}, {ok: v.get('google.com')?.password === 'pass2', message: 'google credential should be retrievable'}, {ok: v.get('naver.com')?.password !== v.get('google.com')?.password, message: 'per-domain isolation'} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const v = ctx.agent.credentials; ctx.agent.setMode('ask'); const r1 = v.shouldAutofill({mode: 'ask', action: 'fill', currentUrl: 'https://naver.com/login', params: {ref: 'password'}}); ctx.agent.setMode('agent'); const r2 = v.shouldAutofill({mode: 'agent', action: 'fill', currentUrl: 'https://malicious.com/login', params: {ref: 'password'}}); const r3 = v.shouldAutofill({mode: 'agent', action: 'fill', currentUrl: 'https://naver.com/search', params: {ref: 'q'}}); const r4 = v.shouldAutofill({mode: 'agent', action: 'fill', currentUrl: 'https://naver.com/login', params: {ref: 'password'}}); return [ {ok: r1 === null, message: 'autofill blocked in ask mode'}, {ok: r2 === null, message: 'autofill blocked for wrong domain'}, {ok: r3 === null, message: 'autofill blocked for non-credential field'}, {ok: r4 !== null && r4.username === 'user1', message: 'autofill succeeds when all conditions met'} ]; }
